name: testWaitForScopeShowEyeDiagram
title: testWaitForScopeShowEyeDiagram
syntax: long testWaitForScopeShowEyeDiagram(message frame, dword groupNumber, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 1
description: Show the eye diagram for a single frame or a node without analysis.

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: The used CAN, LIN or FlexRay frame for the eye diagram.
